caveats: Public showcase only. No real patient data, secure AHS data, private Snowflake data, or private AHS endpoints are used.
Internal ED operating state, model outputs, scenario effects, and unit-level operating values are synthetic demonstration values.
Public facts are used only where cited. Unit-level values without public evidence are labelled synthetic planning assumptions.

controls.label: RSV surge intensity
controls.mechanism: Increases pediatric respiratory arrivals and cohorting pressure.

controls.label: Influenza surge intensity
controls.mechanism: Increases infectious/respiratory arrivals and admission-likely cases.

controls.label: COVID wave intensity
controls.mechanism: Raises respiratory isolation and diagnostics demand.

controls.label: Measles exposure cluster
controls.mechanism: Adds isolation and public-health-sensitive throughput friction.

controls.label: School reopening effect
controls.mechanism: Increases infectious, injury, and evening arrival patterns.

controls.label: Long weekend effect
controls.mechanism: Shifts arrival timing and discharge/bed availability.

controls.label: Large public event
controls.mechanism: Raises injury and access timing pressure.

controls.label: Smoke/AQHI deterioration
controls.mechanism: Raises asthma/respiratory sensitivity and uncertainty.

controls.label: Heat wave
controls.mechanism: Adds dehydration and outdoor activity stress.

controls.label: Extreme cold/snowstorm
controls.mechanism: Adds access friction and acuity timing changes.

controls.label: Travel/access disruption
controls.mechanism: Clusters arrivals and interfacility movement delays.

controls.label: Population/catchment demand shift
controls.mechanism: Sustained demand increase across all arrival streams.

controls.label: CTAS 1-2 increase
controls.mechanism: Raises resuscitation, physician, diagnostics, and admission pressure.

controls.label: Respiratory cohorting demand
controls.mechanism: Consumes isolation and respiratory cohort space.

controls.label: Mental health presentation increase
controls.mechanism: Lengthens consult and disposition pathways.

controls.label: Trauma/injury increase
controls.mechanism: Raises imaging, procedure, and critical-care pressure.

controls.label: Dehydration/GI outbreak
controls.mechanism: Raises arrivals and treatment-room dwell time.

controls.label: Oncology/immunocompromised pathway pressure
controls.mechanism: Raises admission-likely and isolation-sensitive flows.

controls.label: Diagnostic-heavy case mix increase
controls.mechanism: Raises diagnostic queue and LOS.

controls.label: Triage nurse capacity change
controls.mechanism: Changes triage service capacity.

controls.label: Physician coverage change
controls.mechanism: Changes initial assessment throughput.

controls.label: ED nurse staffing change
controls.mechanism: Changes room turnover and treatment throughput.

controls.label: Room availability change
controls.mechanism: Changes pull from waiting room.

controls.label: Resuscitation space occupancy
controls.mechanism: Consumes critical care spaces.

controls.label: Rapid assessment zone capacity
controls.mechanism: Improves initial assessment and low/moderate-acuity streaming.

controls.label: Fast-track capacity
controls.mechanism: Shortens CTAS 4/5 waits and discharged LOS.

controls.label: Respiratory cohort pathway capacity
controls.mechanism: Improves respiratory cohort throughput.

controls.label: Diagnostics turnaround improvement
controls.mechanism: Reduces diagnostic delay.

controls.label: Consult turnaround improvement
controls.mechanism: Reduces consult delay and disposition waits.

controls.label: Social work/mental health support availability
controls.mechanism: Reduces mental-health consult and disposition friction.

controls.label: EMS offload process improvement
controls.mechanism: Improves ambulance handoff and front-door smoothing.

controls.label: Discharge acceleration
controls.mechanism: Brings inpatient bed availability forward.

controls.label: Inpatient staffed-bed availability
controls.mechanism: Changes receiving capacity.

controls.label: Pediatric medicine bed release
controls.mechanism: Targets highest-volume receiving service.

controls.label: PICU receiving capacity
controls.mechanism: Changes critical-care admission constraint.

controls.label: Surgery receiving capacity
controls.mechanism: Changes surgical boarding risk.

controls.label: Oncology receiving capacity
controls.mechanism: Changes specialty admission constraint.

controls.label: Mental health receiving capacity
controls.mechanism: Changes mental-health disposition constraint.

controls.label: Bed-cleaning turnaround
controls.mechanism: Improves bed readiness timing.

controls.label: Transfer-out throughput
controls.mechanism: Relieves ED/inpatient congestion where transfer is appropriate.

controls.label: Transfer-in pressure
controls.mechanism: Raises tertiary referral and bed pressure.

controls.label: Isolation constraint severity
controls.mechanism: Reduces flexible bed and room matching.

controls.label: Activate respiratory surge pathway
controls.mechanism: Switch; improves respiratory cohort throughput.

controls.label: Extend fast-track hours
controls.mechanism: Switch; improves evening low-acuity flow.

controls.label: Add rapid assessment provider
controls.mechanism: Switch; improves initial assessment.

controls.label: Pull-to-full rooming
controls.mechanism: Switch; pulls waiting patients into rooms if nursing capacity supports it.

controls.label: Physician-in-triage style model
controls.mechanism: Switch; reduces front-door physician wait for selected patients.

controls.label: Early inpatient bed huddle
controls.mechanism: Switch; improves bed assignment timing.

controls.label: Discharge-before-noon improvement
controls.mechanism: Switch; brings bed capacity forward.

controls.label: Consultant response target
controls.mechanism: Switch; improves consult turnaround.

controls.label: Diagnostic prioritization for admission-likely patients
controls.mechanism: Switch; reduces admission decision delay.

controls.label: Temporary flex space
controls.mechanism: Switch; increases short-term rooming capacity with staffing caveat.
